category_description: Failure or malfunction of plant, machinery, or equipment due to wear, defect, or inadequate maintenance.
Incident or nonconformity arising from missing, incomplete, or unverified competency/training.
Breakdown in a defined procedure or workflow — steps skipped, controls bypassed, or the process not followed.
A required inspection, test, or verification was overdue, skipped, or not recorded.
Absent or inadequate engineered safeguard (guarding, ventilation, containment, interlock).
Deficiency in the governing system — policy, MOC, document control, oversight, or accountability.
Action slip, lapse, or mistake by an individual despite adequate systems and training.
Contributing conditions from the working environment (weather, lighting, temperature, housekeeping).
